acceptance_criteria.summary: capabilities.yaml's manage_beads.claude.tools now lists the full explicit set of 14 mcp__cognovis-tools__bead_* typed tool names, including bead_update_notes. bead-orchestrator.md and quick-fix.md (built via build-agent.py --harness claude) now expose all of them, matching their documented workflow needs (bead_close for the Phase-0/Step-5c recovery paths, bead_create/bead_dep_add for discovered-work routing, bead_review_write for the reviewer gate refresh).

session-close.md builds with the full typed bead_* tool set (close/update operations retained). review-agent.md and verification-agent.md were confirmed, at both source-frontmatter level and built-artifact level, to not declare manage_beads and to gain zero mcp__cognovis-tools__bead_* tools — no narrow review-cache/evidence write was documented for either role, so none was added. Neither file was modified.

The only production change is capabilities.yaml (the canonical capability registry). scripts/build-agent.py's apply_capabilities()/_set_tools() merge logic was read and confirmed correct as-is and was not modified. No file under cognovis-core/, ~/.claude/agents/, ~/.codex/agents/, or any other installed-artifact location was touched. All generated agent artifacts asserted on in tests are reproduced live by build-agent.py from capabilities.yaml plus the real cognovis-core/agents/*.md sources at test-run time, not from any pre-built/hand-edited copy.

Hermetic regression fixtures in tests/test_build_agent.py assert manage_beads.claude.tools is non-empty and contains every typed tool (fails if it regresses to []) and that cognovis-tools stays registered in mcpServers. Fleet-level fixtures in tests/test_cognovis_agent_fleet_capabilities.py assert review-agent/verification-agent gain zero bead_* tools, plus a synthetic-reviewer regression fixture proving that assertion is not vacuous (a reviewer-shaped agent that wrongly declares manage_beads is shown to leak all 14 bead_* tools).

Hermetic smoke: builds the real bead-orchestrator.md and confirms mcp__cognovis-tools__bead_update_notes (and the rest of the typed set) is declared, while review-agent.md/verification-agent.md builds confirm zero bead_* tools. Stronger-evidence live smoke (optional, additionally performed): a real mcp__cognovis-tools__bead_show and mcp__cognovis-tools__bead_update_notes call against this bead (CL-j92j) both succeeded from this implementation session, recording an actual progress note through the typed tool.

commits.message: test(CL-j92j): red — manage_beads must expose typed cognovis-tools bead_* tools
feat(CL-j92j): green — populate manage_beads.claude.tools with typed cognovis-tools bead_* names
docs(CL-j92j): correct mcpServers-alone-is-enough claim in rollback doc + ADR-0007 amendment

tests.result: RED gate (hermetic, no cognovis-core dependency): 2 failed for the correct pre-fix reason (manage_beads granted zero Claude tools), 1 passed (the negative-fixture test that exercises the assertion helper itself and is expected to pass unconditionally).

RED gate (fleet, real cognovis-core sibling sources): 4 failed for the correct pre-fix reason (bead-orchestrator/quick-fix/session-close missing all 14 typed tools; synthetic role-leakage fixture found zero leaked tools instead of the expected leak), 2 passed (review-agent/verification-agent already correctly had zero bead_* tools, which must hold both before and after the fix).
Full regression gate for touched files: 45 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped-due-to-error. Re-ran after the doc edits with the same result.
status: ok, implementation artifacts are valid (after correcting an initial schema-shape mismatch on manifest.tests).

scope_changes: None. Stayed within the prompt's declared scope: inspect_git (CL-rx6z) was not touched, no cognovis-core/ files were edited, no agent-body prose was rewritten, scripts/build-agent.py was not modified (merge logic verified correct as-is; AC4 satisfied via pytest negative regression fixtures per the prompt's stated preference for test-suite failures over new blocking runtime behavior).
downstream_impacts: Every agent declaring manage_beads (bead-orchestrator, quick-fix, session-close, wave-orchestrator, bead-author — all in the sibling cognovis-core repo) will gain the 14 typed mcp__cognovis-tools__bead_* tools in their generated Claude frontmatter on next rebuild via build-agent.py / `library use`.

Installed artifacts (e.g. ~/.claude/agents/*.md) are not automatically updated by this bead; a rebuild/reinstall step (library sync / library use) is required to project the fix into an already-installed fleet, and is outside this bead's declared scope.

docs/mcp-migration-rollback.md and docs/adr/library-tool-surface-mcp.md now correctly describe the mechanism; readers following the rollback doc's manual revert steps will use the corrected explicit-tool-list shape.

evidence_refs.description: Fleet-level RED run confirming bead-orchestrator/quick-fix/session-close missed all 14 typed bead_* tools before the fix.

Fleet-level GREEN run confirming bead-orchestrator/quick-fix/session-close expose all 14 typed bead_* tools (including bead_update_notes and bead_close) after the fix, and that review-agent/verification-agent still expose zero.
Hermetic RED run against the real capabilities.yaml confirming manage_beads.claude.tools was empty before the fix.
Hermetic GREEN run confirming manage_beads.claude.tools is the full typed list and mcpServers still includes cognovis-tools after the fix.
Source-level check (grep on cognovis-core/agents/{review-agent,verification-agent}.md capabilities: block) confirming neither declares manage_beads, both before and after this bead's change.

git diff --stat 31de252 HEAD limited to capabilities.yaml, docs/mcp-migration-rollback.md, docs/adr/library-tool-surface-mcp.md, tests/test_build_agent.py, tests/test_cognovis_agent_fleet_capabilities.py.

Live mcp__cognovis-tools__bead_show(bead_id="CL-j92j") and mcp__cognovis-tools__bead_update_notes(bead_id="CL-j92j", ...) calls both returned status ok from this implementation session, recording a real progress note. Supplementary evidence only — these tools were pre-granted to this session by its launching harness, not produced by this bead's capabilities.yaml fix.
